testcase.name: test_pdf_contains_admin_manager_role

failure.message:
AssertionError: PDF should contain 'المدير الإداري' (Admin Manager) role assert ('المدير الإداري' in 'ﺷﺮﻛﺔ ﺩﺍﺭ ﺍﻟﻜﻮﺩ ﻟﻼﺳﺘﺸﺎﺭﺍﺕ ﺍﻟﻬﻨﺪﺳﻴﺔ

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_pdf_contains_sultan_arabic_name

failure.message: AssertionError: PDF should contain Sultan's Arabic name 'سلطان الزامل' assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration44_pdf_arabic_names.py:206: in test_pdf_contains_sultan_arabic_name assert has_sultan_ar, "PDF should contain Sultan's Arabic name 'سلطان الزامل'" E AssertionError: PDF should contain Sultan's Arabic name 'سلطان الزامل' E assert False
